text.title: Lessons Learned Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding the lessons-learned methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; the final rule defines when to skip this methodology entirely.

rule.statement: Project planning MUST retrieve relevant lessons before estimation; un-retrieved lessons are not lessons.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Lesson MUST be reusable across projects (general pattern + recommendation), not project-specific narrative.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Each lesson MUST be tagged with one category from the taxonomy (process, technical, vendor, comms, risk).
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Each lesson MUST cite its source project + retro/closure event.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Lesson repository MUST be reviewed quarterly for relevance; stale lessons archived.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.

rule.statement: Skip when no future projects or retrieval not enforced.
rule.rationale: Binary check; non-compliance is the antipattern in `03-failure-modes.xml`.
